steps.title: Rewrite the boundary
steps.content:
Solve the inequality for $y$. Divide by $-8$, so the inequality direction reverses.
$$5x-8y>40$$
$$-8y>40-5x$$
$$y<\frac{5}{8}x-5$$

steps.title: Check the impossible region
steps.content: If $x<0$, then $\frac{5}{8}x-5<-5$. In the region where $x<0$ and $y>0$, every $y$-value is positive, so it cannot be less than a number below $-5$. The answer is A.
